title: Smoky Norwegian Grassy Broil
description: Grassy, flaky, energizing Norwegian dish featuring dashi and broil, perfect for a weeknight meal.
instructions: Season cod fillet with smoked salt, black pepper, and a sprinkle of fresh dill.
Place cod on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving space for even broiling.
Drizzle grape seed oil over cod, followed by a squeeze of lemon juice.
Broil cod for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through and flaky.
Roll out flaky pastry dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Place pastry sheet on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Cut pastry into desired shapes, if desired.
Bake pastry in preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove pastry from oven and let cool completely.
To assemble broil, place a piece of cod on top of a piece of pastry, then drizzle with a little dashi and top with a sprinkle of chopped parsley.
